sentence: 她和表亲每年春节聚一次。
pinyin: Tā hé biǎoqīn měi nián Chūnjié jù yī cì.
english: She gets together with her cousins once a year during Spring Festival.

sentence: 她毕业后在高校做了两年博士后研究。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu zài gāoxiào zuò le liǎng nián bóshìhòu yánjiū.
english: After graduating she did two years of postdoctoral research at a university.

sentence: 他喜欢写随笔记录日常生活。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān xiě suíbǐ jìlù rìcháng shēnghuó.
english: He likes to write casual essays to record his daily life.

sentence: 工程师对系统进行了最优化处理。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī duì xìtǒng jìnxíng le zuì yōuhuà chǔlǐ.
english: The engineer performed optimization on the system.

sentence: 这家公司只招聘应届毕业生。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zhǐ zhāopìn yìngjiè bìyèshēng.
english: This company only recruits this year's graduates.
